## 2025-03-17 - WebP C2PA Metadata Stripping
**Learning:** WebP images generated by certain AI tools or cameras can include significant Content Provenance (C2PA) metadata. In this case, the `C2PA` chunk was ~140KB, which is substantial compared to the ~350KB image data. Stripping these RIFF chunks is 100% lossless as it doesn't touch the VP8/VP8L encoded image data.
**Action:** Always check WebP files for large non-image chunks (like C2PA, EXIF, or XMP) in documentation-heavy repositories where image load time impacts LCP.
